technique_summary: Solid performance with proper surgeon's knot formation, correct hand switching between throws, and good overall technique. Completion time consistent with trainee's historical performance range.
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise suture placement to reduce deviation penalties
Consider slightly faster knot tying while maintaining quality
